name: fort-maintenance
description: Costa Rica owns costa_rica with fortificationLevel=2 set at T0 via set_fort_level. No army (armySize=0), no port, no market, no road. Fort maintenance = fortificationLevel × FORT_MAINTENANCE_PER_LEVEL = 2 × 0.08 = 0.16/tick deducted from nation wealth. Costa Rica starts at wealthStock=3. nicaragua has no fort (control group). Over 10 ticks, costa_rica's wealth trajectory should show the 0.16/tick deduction vs nicaragua's production-only trajectory. Metric output (stockpiles_per_nation_per_tick) confirms fort maintenance is being deducted. The scenario validates v0.41 fort maintenance integration into the infrastructure maintenance block.

payload.comment: Fort L2 contributes FORT_INFRA_CONTRIBUTION_PER_LEVEL × effectiveFortLevel to infrastructure bonus — verifies fort level is being counted in equilibrium (even ungarrisoned at FORT_UNGARRISONED_PENALTY)
